records.ety: [OE. tollen to draw, to entice; of uncertain origin. Cf. Toll to ring a bell.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Toled (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Toling.]

defs: To draw, or cause to follow, by displaying something pleasing or desirable; to allure by some bait.
quotes: Whatever you observe him to be more frighted at then he should, tole him on to by insensible degrees, till at last he masters the difficulty.
